input_schema.description: A collection of cat pictures to rank by the expressive character of the cat in each image.

items.description: A cat picture to evaluate for expressive character.

input_merge.$starlark: [item for sublist in input for item in sublist]

input_schema.description: Cat pictures to rank by the expressiveness of the cat's facial expression.

items.description: A cat picture to evaluate for facial expressiveness.

input_merge.$starlark: [item for sublist in input for item in sublist]

input_schema.description: Cat pictures to rank by the expressiveness of the cat's body posture and physical tension.

items.description: A cat picture to evaluate for body posture expressiveness.

input_merge.$starlark: [item for sublist in input for item in sublist]

input_schema.description: A single cat picture to evaluate for specificity of individual character.

output.$starlark: [score / sum(output) for score in output] if sum(output) > 0 else [1.0 / len(output)] * len(output)

description: Ranks cat pictures by expressive character — evaluating facial expression, body posture, and specificity of individual personality. Images where the cat's pose communicates something particular about its inner life rank high; generic, interchangeable poses rank low.
